install_cmds: apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root update -q && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root install -y --no-install-recommends git wget unzip build-essential && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
pip install gsplat==1.5.3 torchmetrics lpips plyfile tqdm imageio opencv-python-headless piexif scikit-learn matplotlib tensorly 'numpy<2.0.0'
TORCH_CUDA_ARCH_LIST='7.0;7.5;8.0;8.6;9.0' python -c "import torchmetrics, lpips; print('torchmetrics+lpips OK; gsplat will JIT-compile at runtime when a GPU is visible')"

data_deps.name: mipnerf360
data_deps.description: Mip-NeRF 360 dataset (garden, bicycle, bonsai, stump scenes) for 3DGS evaluation.

data_deps.name: gsplat_torch_cache
data_deps.description: Torch cache containing AlexNet weights used by torchmetrics LPIPS during 3DGS evaluation.
